reapack.name: Session Builder.lua
reapack.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern Studio
reapack.description: Advanced tool for creating and structuring professional work sessions in Reaper.

reapack.name: Auto-Assign Analog Molecule.lua
reapack.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern Studio
reapack.description: Automated parameter assignment and routing workflow specifically designed for Analog Molecule.

reapack.name: locate_peaks_item.lua
reapack.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern Studio
reapack.description: Quickly identifies and locates peak volume levels and transients within selected items.

reapack.name: Setlist Manager Pro.lua
reapack.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern Studio
reapack.description: Professional setlist manager to organize projects, songs, and performance order.

reapack.name: __startup.lua
reapack.author: Jordi Molas - The Little Cavern Studio
reapack.description: Main startup engine and dashboard for dynamic loading of sessions and recent projects.
